features.name: nor_reduction_operator_on_4bit_vector
features.description: Code should include a nor reduction operator ~| applied to a 4-bit input vector assigned to a 4-bit output

features.name: nor_vs_bitwise_not_of_reduction
features.description: Code should include both ~|a (nor reduction) and ~(|a) (bitwise not of reduction) expressions to distinguish between them

features.name: reduction_operator_result_width_extension
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator whose single-bit result is implicitly extended to match a wider output width
